title: Sweet Crispy Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A sweet and crispy Algerian dish featuring lamb, hoisin sauce, and a blend of spices, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe is high in protein and can be served as a main course.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the hoisin sauce, honey, and chicken broth to the pot. Stir to combine.
Return the lamb to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven. Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and increase the oven temperature to 400°F (200°C).
Remove the lid from the pot and cook the lamb for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until crispy on top.
